Class User

java.lang.Object
Entities.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Guest, Manager, Subscriber, Supervisor
public abstract class User extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract base class representing a user in the restaurant system. Serves as the parent class for Subscriber, Guest, RestaurantSupervisor, and RestaurantManager. Stores common user attributes such as user ID, email, phone, and role.
See Also:

      protected User(int userID, String email, String phone, UserRole role)

      userID - the unique identifier of the user
      email - the email address of the user
      phone - the phone number of the user
      role - the role of the user in the system
